title: CLOSURE
content:
CLOSURE

Been on my knees for awhile now, eyes closed
And I haven’t seen anything from a new angle
No new perspective, no new resolutions, no new results
And though the dust seems settled when the lights are dimmed
Data continues to pour in from every input
All bases investigated
All rocks unturned now turned
to insure all boxes have been checked
All i’s have been dotted, all t’s have been crossed
Closure or no closure, nothing has been closed
I’ve been on my knees for awhile now,
Next to you and you promised me
You promised this would bring me peace,
Help to relieve whatever is inside tearing me apart
Whats been making me shake with fear
And frustration
And anger
And sadness
You said to kneel
Bar my hands and pin my wrists with needles
Silence and solemness wrapped tight together breed results
But why should I listen to someone
Someone who has been kneeling their whole life
Someone who has only asked but never taken
